metadata.title: India Contractor Management Services | Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: India contractor management and compliant contractor onboarding. Engage freelancers in India without entity. Indian contractor classification, GST, TDS, contracts. Fast onboarding.

faqs.title: India Contractor FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about contractor management in India.

items.question: What is the risk of misclassifying contractors in India?
items.answer: Indian authorities can reclassify contractors as employees, leading to back EPF/ESI contributions, taxes, TDS penalties, and compliance issues. Using compliant contracts and proper classification assessment reduces this risk.

items.question: How fast can I onboard a contractor in India?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank, contractor onboarding typically takes 2–5 business days once you provide engagement details. We handle contracts, GST registration, tax forms, and compliance checks for India.

items.question: Can I convert a contractor to an employee later?
items.answer: Yes. If a contractor role becomes permanent, we can convert them to a full employee via our India EOR service, with compliant Indian employment contracts and benefits (EPF, ESI, gratuity, leave).

items.question: Do you handle contractor payments and invoicing in India?
items.answer: Yes. Our platform supports contractor invoicing and payments in INR, with proper GST documentation, TDS compliance, and tax filings for Indian contractors.

items.question: What are the GST and TDS requirements for contractors in India?
items.answer: Contractors may need GST registration if annual turnover exceeds ₹20 lakhs. TDS (Tax Deducted at Source) applies to contractor payments at specified rates. We help ensure all GST and TDS obligations are met for compliant contractor engagements.
